name: Oven Fried Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Pancake Mix (recipe); or packaged pancake mix
2 tablespoons Vegetable oil; (or 1/2 that for low-fat)
1 Fryer chicken; cut up (3 1/2 to 4 lbs.)
recipeInstructions:
1. This is really EXCELLENT, but makes a huge mess in the pan. Line the baking pan with foil or baking parchment so you can discard it after cooking.
2. To reduce fat, remove skin from chicken pieces and use less oil (as indicated) in the batter.
3. Combine all ingredients except chicken in a bowl. Mix well.
4. Dip each chicken piece in the batter and place on the lined baking sheet.
5. Bake uncovered for 40 to 50 minutes, until golden brown and tender.
